visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene opens in a living room with a woman wearing a bucket hat and a black off-the-shoulder top sitting on a light wooden floor. She is crying and throwing white paper receipts into the air, which scatter around her and a small white bowl. (2) A second woman, wearing a beret and a grey dress, enters the frame from the left. She sits next to the crying woman, places a hand on her shoulder for comfort, and presents a green heart-shaped container. (3) The camera cuts to a close-up of a gift box containing four heart-shaped cheesecakes with smiley faces on them. The two women are then seen together, forming a heart shape with their hands behind a heart-shaped arrangement of these small containers on a table. (4) A series of close-ups show a gold spoon scooping into different cheesecakes: a yellow lemon one, a green matcha one, and a dark brown chocolate one. The women take turns tasting the cakes, smiling broadly, nodding, and giving thumbs-up gestures to the camera. (5) One woman is seen preparing a topping by pouring a clear liquid from a bottle into a glass filled with red berries, then scattering the berries onto a cheesecake. (6) The video concludes with both women sitting behind stacks of brand-labeled boxes and holding a shopping bag, gesturing towards the camera while smiling.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 嗚嗚嗚. (2) [Variety]: 發票連續三年都沒中過. (3) [Subtitle]: 別傷心了 快來吃一口療癒人心的. (4) [Slogan]: 厚乳酪蛋糕!. (5) [Variety]: 心型的包裝超可愛. (6) [Subtitle]: 夏日必吃的. [Slogan]: 酸甜檸檬. (7) [Variety]: 好酸好上癮. (8) [Subtitle]: 來自日本的. [Slogan]: 靜岡抹茶. (9) [Variety]: 抹茶很濃不會苦 好吃! OMG. (10) [Subtitle]: 大人味的黑巧克力. (11) [Subtitle]: 明明是重乳酪搭配苦甜的巧克力 卻不會口乾. (12) [Variety]: 厲害. (13) [Subtitle]: 一口接一口的. [Slogan]: 黃金原味. (14) [Subtitle]: 它吃起來不會很甜 帶有一點乳酪的鹹香. (15) [Variety]: 很濃郁但口感柔順 不愧是含有72%的超厚重乳酪. (16) [Subtitle]: 還可以把喜歡的莓果泡在酒裡 撒在蛋糕上就成了. [Slogan]: 大人的獨家口味. (17) [Variety]: 美味しい. (18) [Variety]: 好吃好吃好吃好吃好吃好吃好吃好吃. (19) [Subtitle]: 留言告訴我你的不幸的時刻 我們抽三位一起來分享. [Slogan]: 幸福的醇厚好滋味. (20) [Slogan]: 台中最新伴手禮 瞇瞇眼 72%厚乳酪蛋糕 不要錯過. [Logo]: MIMIAN. (21) [Variety]: 網購超方便. (22) [Subtitle]: 我要再訂五盒巧克力! 我全都要! 綜合款謝謝!

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators appear throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman wears a tan bucket hat, a black off-the-shoulder long-sleeve top, and blue jeans. The other woman wears a black beret, a grey long-sleeve dress, and later a grey top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern living room with a large orange leather sofa, wooden blinds, and light-colored wooden flooring. Later scenes show a grey marble-topped table and a kitchen counter area with coffee machines and bottles.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with the high-pitched, sobbing sounds of a female character, accompanied by the crisp rustling of paper being thrown. (2) A cheerful, high-tempo electronic BGM with a steady beat immediately fades in. A bright, energetic male voice-over begins narrating with clear articulation. (3) Frequent 'pop' and 'whoosh' sound effects punctuate the transitions between shots. The sound of a metal spoon clinking against a container is heard clearly. (4) The female characters provide vocal reactions including 'Oh!' and excited chatter, which overlap with the continuous male narration. (5) A distinct liquid pouring sound occurs when the berries are topped with alcohol. (6) The video ends with a high-energy call-to-action sequence featuring synchronized vocal enthusiasm and final impact sound effects.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote 'MIMIAN' cheesecakes by framing them as a 'healing' solution for a bad day (unlucky lottery). It showcases variety in flavor and texture through high-energy presentation, close-up food shots, and social proof (creators' reactions), ultimately driving engagement through a giveaway and online ordering call-to-action.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video explicitly mentions the brand 'MIMIAN', shows packaging, provides a product review, and includes a call-to-action for purchase and a giveaway.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-intensity social media editing with dense variety text and upbeat audio designed to maintain high engagement.
